target: 7. Yoshikawa Line
Shinpei Ajiro
(I suddenly felt exhausted after eating...)
(I want to go to sleep right away... But I have to take a bath first...)
(A call... from Sou?)
Hello?
Shinpei? Do you have a minute right now?
Yeah, it's fine.
About that conversation that got cut off during the day...
Ah... the rumor about Ushio's body being autopsied?
That rumor was exaggerated.
Eh? Is that so?
Yeah... there was no autopsy. My dad just attended the police's coroner's inquest, that's all.
What, if that's the case—
However.
During that inquest, they found <color=#GF_TIPS_064>Yoshikawa lines</color>. On Ushio's neck...
Yoshikawa lines...?
That's right... —Marks of being strangled by someone...!!
Eh...
In other words... Ushio's death wasn't just an accident—
It means there's a possibility of murder!!
!! ...Huh? M-Murder... that's...!!
Are you saying there's someone who would kill Ushio!? I mean, you guys were together, right!? W-What is going on!!
Yeah... we were definitely together. But, no one... saw anything.
That day... we were playing at the beach behind the elementary school where tourists don't go.
The ones there were me and Tokiko. Ushio and Mio, Shiori-chan and two of her friends... Seven people in total.
Ushio was the first to notice Shiori-chan drowning and being swept out to sea, and went to help her with a swim ring...
Mio and I jumped in right after, but there was no one suspicious around...
What the hell is that!! It doesn't make any sense...!!
Yeah... And we can't even ask Shiori-chan about it in her condition...
...Does everyone know about the Yoshikawa lines?
Of course not!!
The only ones who know are Mio, Alain-san, the local cop... and my dad. But based on the situation, they concluded that murder is impossible.
…What about the police?
They're processing it as an accidental death.
I see...
Shin-chan, do you have a sec?
Ah, wait a second.
Mio?
Yeah... Sorry, I should get going for today...
Got it, I'll contact you again. ...Stay by Mio's side today.
Yeah... got it. Thanks.
Sorry. You can open it now.
Shin-chan…
What's wrong?
You see... this. The <color=#GF_KEY_USI_NECKLACE>necklace</color> Onee-chan was wearing at the end.
I thought it would be better if you had it, Shin-chan...
Ushio had this?
Yeah. It was in her pool bag. Onee-chan's memento...
She was always wearing it. Whether she went out or stayed at home, she treated it like it was precious...
She even carried it with her that day... But, at the very end... only at the very end...
Hey, Shin-chan…
I can't...!! Ever again...!! See Onee-chan...!!
I hate this... I hate it...!!
…Yeah.
...I can't forgive them...
The one who... killed Onee-chan...!!
...H-Hey, Mio... Do you... know something!!?
*Bllloooow!!* *Sniiiiiiff!!*
W-Whoa!? Hey you!! Don't blow your nose on someone else's clothes!!
Ehehe... sorry. It's nothing.
If I stay gloomy forever, Onee-chan will get mad at me. I have to make today the last day I cry...!!
See ya, Shin-chan! Ah, the bath is open, so you can go in!
A... y-yeah.
...Ushio had this pendant—
Pretty...
Thanks, Shinpei! I'll treasure it!!
(The seashell I gave her... Even though it's so common and nothing special...)
She... still kept this...
...Ugh, uu...
